mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_replies ( inquiry_id, recipient_email, reply, sent_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{inquiryId}, #{recipientEmail}, #{reply}, #{sentAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, inquiry_id, recipient_email, reply, sent_at, created_at FROM inquiry_replies WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId} ORDER BY sent_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, inquiry_id, recipient_email, reply, sent_at, created_at FROM inquiry_replies WHERE recipient_email = #{recipientEmail} ORDER BY sent_at DESC, id DESC
